title: OrgX-Bench Evaluation Pre-Registration Manifest
description: Published BEFORE a benchmark run to pre-empt 'you chose the tests after seeing the results.' The run is then executed and its bundle references this manifest's id.

id.description: Stable id; the result bundle references this.

date.description: Pre-registration date (YYYY-MM-DD), set before the run.

claim.description: The single falsifiable hypothesis this run tests.

arms.description: Named comparison arms. Vague labels (Model A/B/C) are forbidden.

system.description: single_frontier | provider_native_agent | best_of_n | self_reflection | static_orgx | adaptive_orgx | full_orgx | fugu | fugu_ultra

budget.description: Matched resource allowance — the compute-matched-orchestration control.

tasks.description: Split/suite identifier, e.g. public_validation_worlds_v2 or private_holdout.

headlineEligible.description: False for any public_validation / contamination-visible run.
